_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=second exact-integer same-medium witness with a different signal/screen/pump, showing recovery is pump-independent. -->
primary_source: (Hellwarth, 1977) DOI 10.1364/JOSA.67.000001; (Yariv, 1978) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1978.1069870. Same-medium recovery, distinct pump (p_f=13) -> qa_neg(20)=4, confirming pump-independence.
